description: Real-time agent presence tracking with heartbeat mechanism and online/offline status indicators. Two endpoints: /presence (GET status of all agents) and /presence/heartbeat (POST to signal alive). Agent considered offline after 120s without heartbeat.

definition.implementation_summary: In-memory dict tracks {agent_name: last_heartbeat_timestamp}. GET /presence returns all agents with status (online if heartbeat < 120s ago, offline otherwise). POST /presence/heartbeat with {agent: name} updates timestamp. Exchange UI shows green/red dot per agent. Heartbeat should be sent every 60s by each agent's session start or background process.
definition.adaptation_notes: Add both endpoints to your exchange app.py. Integrate heartbeat call into your session start protocol. Adjust timeout threshold (120s default) based on your session frequency.

adaptation_notes: Add /presence and /presence/heartbeat routes to your exchange app.py. Send heartbeat at session start.
